scripts.audit:executive-capabilities: npm run audit:capability -- "Executive Assessment" && npm run audit:capability -- "Executive Understanding Synthesis" && npm run audit:capability -- "Organizational Learning Profile" && npm run audit:capability -- "Theory Validation" && npm run audit:capability -- "Investigation Opportunity Generation"
scripts.validate: npm run typecheck && npm run evaluate
scripts.discovery:brief: npm run cognition:validate && npm run audit:executive-capabilities && npm run architecture:state && npm run architecture:handoff && npm run sprint:brief
scripts.sprint:architecture: npm run cognition:validate && npm run audit:executive-capabilities && npm run architecture:state && npm run architecture:handoff && cat "docs/Sprint Updates/ARCHITECTURE_HANDOFF.md"
